details: Investigating R5 uniform/negative bf16 ulp-flip residual; committed snapshot

Compute kernel + descriptor read. D=64->Dt=2,c=4. S=512->Nkv=4,cur_ckv=4. Q=K=0 => P=1.0 exact, alpha=1.0, O=sum(V). Hypothesis H1: PV matmul FPU at HiFi3 truncates V mantissa (bf16 input to FPU has limited mantissa even with fp32 dest acc) producing sub-ulp error.

H2 (stronger): SFPU Recip(l) is approximate. recip(512) != exact 2^-9 but 2^-9*(1+-eps). O*inv then carries relative error ~eps, RNE to bf16 flips near-midpoint outputs. This is the 0.25-ulp residual. Phase 11 recip is the suspect, not the matmul.
